steps.title: Spot the desire signal
steps.content: The strongest signal is “wanted to follow them” combined with the named destinations: “Jacksonville, the sea, the wide world.” This reveals John's active longing for somewhere beyond his small-town existence.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D matches perfectly: it identifies this sentence as expressing John's desire for “a larger life outside the Florida woods.” The other choices miss the mark by focusing on location description (A), townspeople's reactions (B), or comparative imagination (C), rather than John's personal yearning.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
